titleStmt.title: SII 38.511: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 511. (A.R. No. 511 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the same wall, yāga-maṇḍapa, Siddharatnēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Parakēsarivarman Tribhuvanachakravatti Vikramachōḷa Year 13: 1131 A.D.

summary.p: Begins with the meykīrtti of the king Pu-mādu etc; of the ruler. It records a sale of land by Bāradāyaṉ Kūttaṉ alias Kailāśam-uḍaiyāṉ, a brāhmaṇa of Śrikaṇṭachaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēyam of Tiruvūṟṟattūr-nāḍu (a sub-division) of Tribhuvanamuḻuḍai-vaḷanāḍu, for ten aṉṟāḍu-naṟkāśu to the god uḍaiyār Togumaṇiyāṇḍār of Ūṟṟattūr. It is stated that the seller obtained this land called Paṟaichchey, by way of dowry (strīdhanam) from a certain Vasishṭaṉ Araśuvaṉ Sīyaṉāthan (his father-in-law). Among the boundaries, of the land sold, a common land endowed for the livelihood of vēdic brāhmaṇas (kiḍaippuṟam) is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmātu puṇara puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamaātu virumpa taṉ tiruppatumalar maṉna
var cūṭa maṉṉiyavurimaiyāl maṇimuṭicūṭi ceṅkol ceṉṟu ticaitoṟum vaḷarppa veṅkalinīṅki meyyaṟa
ṉ taḻaippa kaliṅka(m)miriyak kaṭamalai naṭātti valaṅkoḷḷāḻi varaiyāḻi naṭātti Irucuṭaraḷavum Oru kuṭainiḻaṟkiḻ cem
poṉ virasiṅhāsanattu tribhuvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruṉtaruḷiya kopparakecaripaṟmarāṉa tribhavanaccakkara
vartikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻadevarkku yāṇṭu 10 3 Āvatu tripuvaṉamuḻutuṭaivaḷanāṭṭu tiruvūṟṟattūrnāṭṭu
brahmateyam śrīkaṇṭaccaruppetimaṅkalattu braā(m)maṇan pāratāyaṉ kūttaṉāṉa śrīkayilāsa
muṭaiyāṉneṉ tiruvuṟṟattūr Uṭaiyār tokumāmaṇiyāṇṭār caṇṭicaraṟku nāṉ vilaikkuviṟṟa
vilaiyāvaṇamāvatu nampikuṟicciyāṉa cirikaṇṭaccaruppetimaṅkalattu ṉāṉvaciṣṭaṉ Aracuvaṉ
ciyaṉātan pakkal śrītaṉam peṟṟuṭaiya nilam paṟaiccey Eṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattukku Ellai
yāvatu kiḻpārkellai tevatāṉattukku meṟkum teṉpārkellai muḷḷūraṉ ceyku vaṭakkum
mepārkellai Ūrpotuk kiṭaippuṟattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkellai Akattiyaṉ Āḷavaṉtāṉ
piḷḷainampi nilattukku teṟkum Ivvicaiñta peruṉāṉkellai kūṭ(p)paṭṭaRead as kuṭpaṭṭanilattil Eṉṉopāti cempātiyāki
vaṉta nīrnilamum puṟaṇiyum nilaṅkalaṉtapaṭi cempākamum viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmillicaiñta vilai
p poruḷ Aṉṟāṭunaṟkācu pattu Ikkācu pattum Āvaṇakkaḷiye kaiccellaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytu
kuṭutteṉ Uṭaiyār tokumāmaṇiyāṇṭār caṇṭicararku pāratāyaṉkūttaṉ śrīkayilāsamuṭaiyāṉen Iṉta paṟaicce
ri ceyyil cempātiyāl vaṉta ceyāṉatukkum I
māvaṟutip poruṭcelavolaiyāvatuIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.511 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
